title: DISTRUST
body:
### *DISCLAIMER*
This mod is only meant to be used for the private server "Distrust". I will not change aspects of this modpack that describes use of this modpack outside of the server. If you have issues with the modpack, copy it and edit it to your liking.

## this modpack includes extra features for Distrust including:
- A dedicated music resource pack for the server
- Third person camera in first person
- Satisfying sounds in menus and sounds like better footsteps
- Bare Bones texture pack with fresh animations to have the best experience playing in the map.
- Simple but nice shaderpack
- Simple Voicechat
- Zoomify, a nice zoom addon
